steps.title: Identify the introducing phrase
steps.content: The text opens with “Jessica Murray is a researcher who...” followed by an explanation of her research subject (canopy soil) and its significance. This sets up the researcher-first structure.

steps.title: Match the structure to the correct choice
steps.content: Choice B captures the progression: the first sentence introduces Murray as the researcher, and the following sentences detail her research focus and its ecological importance. The other choices either invent conflicts (A, C) or misrepresent the topic as a comparison of tree sizes (D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
